loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) as tdate_begining_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.bank_code, sc_lon_m_contract.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, FPA_LON_REQ_REFINANCE_AMT(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as refinance ,sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status ,sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount ,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch, si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) --and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '0' ) and (sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1')
/*WHERE*/

r_ktm_loan_paid_coll_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )

r_ktm_loan_paid_old_loan_nest.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, (CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) as loan_type_des, sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) AND sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON'

r_ktm_loan_paid_mpaid_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount FROM sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = {0} ) )
